prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京理工大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约458名→342名→304名→210名→143名，呈持续前移趋势，近4年累计前移约315名，2025年基准位次 约143名；该校在海南省招生计划2021年21人→2022年17人→2023年17人→2024年12人→2025年7人，持续大幅缩减；2026年招生计划数据因文件未完整入库，暂按持 平处理，但近年缩招趋势明确，对位次前移有显著推动作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021年第19名→2022年第18名→2023年第16 名→2024年第14名→2025年第13名→2026年第14名，稳居全国前15，属于顶尖高校梯队；2026年声誉评价为偏负面，涉及师德师风事件（宫琳事件等），但学校处 理迅速、舆情应对高效；抖音热度排名第47位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，国防七子标签持续吸引关注；未见明显投档断档记录；信息与通信工程A+、控 制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、机械工程A、材料科学与工程A、光学工程A、管理科学与工程A等，A-及以上学科达12个，工科实力顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等核心工科专业持续高热推荐，与北理工优势学科高度匹配；海南省考生总数2021年52977人→2025年67408人持续增长，2026 年约78000人（较2025年增长约15.7%），竞争加剧，略有上升；北京理工大学位于北京，对海南考生具有较强地域吸 引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、招生计划近年大幅缩减、学校软科排名稳居顶尖、海南省考生总数显 著增加等因素：招生缩减推动位次前移（数字减小），但考生大幅增加（+15.7%）加剧竞争，两者对冲后预计2026年最低录取位次在2025年基准143名基础上小幅后移至约148名， 区间130–166名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（卓越班）
- 工科试验班（未来精工技术）
- 工科试验班（徐特立英才班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（信息科学技术）
- 工科试验班（宇航与机电类）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（电子信息实验班）
- 工科试验班（智能制造与智能车辆精英班）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约148名，区间130–166名。位次在区间下限（130名以内）可重点冲刺一档卓越班/未来精工技术/徐特立英才班；位次在区间中段（140–155名）以二档信息科学技术/宇 航与机电类为主；位次在区间上限（160名以上）建议三档电子信息实验班/智能制造精英班保底。北理工所有专业均为工科试验班大类，入校后分流，一档班型享有专业任选权， 报考价值极高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing Institute of Technology in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 458 → 342 → 304 → 210 → 143, showing a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward movement of about 315 places in the past 4 years, and a baseline ranking of about 143 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan in Hainan Province was 21 in 2021 → 17 in 2022 → 17 in 2023 → 12 in 2024 → 7 in 2025, continuously and significantly shrinking; the 2026 enrollment plan data is not fully archived in the file, so it is temporarily treated as unchanged, but the recent trend of enrollment reduction is clear, which significantly promotes the forward movement of rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science China University Rankings: 19th in 2021 → 18th in 2022 → 16th in 2023 → 14th in 2024 → 13th in 2025 → 14th in 2026, firmly in the top 15 nationally, belonging to the top-tier university echelon; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is slightly negative, involving teacher ethics incidents (Gong Lin incident, etc.), but the university handled it quickly and responded efficiently to public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 47th (relatively hot), short video exposure moderately high, the label of National Defense Seven Sons continues to attract attention; no obvious record of admission gaps; Information and Communication Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanical Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Optical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, etc., with 12 disciplines at A- or above, top-tier engineering strength, strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, highly matching BIT's advantageous disciplines; the total number of candidates in Hainan Province increased from 52,977 in 2021 to 67,408 in 2025, with about 78,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 15.7% compared to 2025), intensifying competition, slightly rising; Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Hainan candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend of historical rankings, the significant reduction in enrollment plan in recent years, BIT's stable top-tier Soft Science ranking, and the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Hainan Province: enrollment reduction pushes rankings forward (numbers decrease), but the significant increase in candidates (+15.7%) intensifies competition, and after offsetting, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to slightly move back to about 148 from the 2025 baseline of 143, with a range of 130–166.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Precision Engineering Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xu Teli Elite Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Mechanical-Electrical Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Information Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Vehicle Elite Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 148, range 130–166. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 130) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Excellence Class/Future Precision Engineering Technology/Xu Teli Elite Class; those in the middle of the range (140–155) should mainly target Tier 2 Information Science and Technology/Aerospace and Mechanical-Electrical Engineering; those at the upper end of the range (above 160) are advised to choose Tier 3 Electronic Information Experimental Class/Intelligent Manufacturing Elite Class as a safety option. All majors at BIT are engineering experimental class categories, with分流 (major selection) after enrollment; Tier 1 classes enjoy the right to freely choose majors, offering extremely high application value.
